case_title: DINA PEREZ-NEIRA VS. TOUCHSTONE GOLF LLC DBA PRESIDIO GOLF COURSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ-NEIRA, DINA AS TO DEFENDANT TOUCHSTONE GOLF LLC DBA PRESIDIO GOLF COURSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00) SERVED JUL-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOUCHSTONE GOLF LLC DBA PRESIDIO GOLF COURSE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOUCHSTONE GOLF LLC DBA PRESIDIO GOLF COURSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF DINA PEREZ-NEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOUCHSTONE GOLF LLC DBA PRESIDIO GOLF COURSE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DON CHELEMEDOS, GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER AMENDING CASE CAPTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ-NEIRA, DINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOUCHSTONE GOLF LLC DBA PRESIDIO GOLF COURSE THE CONTRACT PROVIDES PLAINLY THAT THE DEPOSIT IS NONREFUNDABLE. DEFENDANT NEVER REPRESENTED OTHERWISE. THIS TERM IS NOT SO OPPRESSIVE AS TO BE UNCONSCIONABLE IN LIGHT OF DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT THE FACILITY IS FREQUENTLY BOOKED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
